name: The Lampless Hermitage
descriptionSeed: Where the Numinous train — which is to say, where they sit, for years, doing what looks to a visitor like absolutely nothing and is in fact the hardest thing anyone in this world attempts. Hermits here have not spoken in a decade and are perfectly happy to have you stay, and will not entertain you, and will not explain.
encounterFlavor: Hermits who say nothing and mean it; a novice failing, publicly and painfully; someone who came here to escape and is discovering it does not work that way.
questSeeds: A hermit has broken a twenty-year silence to say one sentence, and it was about you
A novice has been sitting for three years and something has begun sitting WITH them
worldPosNote: Deep expression of its Reach — placed near the equator on the the_numinous_reach bearing. (SNG-180: authored position — WHERE it sits. Independent of axisVector, which is WHAT it is; a bastion is where the two disagree.)
